---
title: "Chantry House.  By Charlotte M. Yonge. author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Unknown to History,” etc.. 2 vols"
---

## Chantry House.  By Charlotte M. Yonge. author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Unknown to History,” etc.. 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
